# astral-sh/uv

Installs uv — fast Python package and project manager (used by uvx-based MCP servers)

## Key Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `uv` | Run uv |
| `uv --help` | Show help and available options |
| `uv --version` | Show installed version |

## Common Usage

```bash
# Check if installed
uv --version

# Show help
uv --help
```
